channel.title: Pages on O.R. in Action
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on O.R. in Action

item.title: Spring Framework
item.author: kunlei1987@gmail.com (Kunlei Lian)
item.description: This is an index page for all the posts related to Java Spring framework. Basics Dependency Injection Inversion of Control Multiple Candidate Dependencies

item.title: R
item.author: kunlei1987@gmail.com (Kunlei Lian)
item.description: This page compiles all the R-related posts. Recipes Plotting multiple histograms in one graph

item.title: Linear Programming
item.author: kunlei1987@gmail.com (Kunlei Lian)
item.description: This page compiles all the posts about linear programming. Basics General vs. standard forms Polyhedron Convexity Linear, Affine, Conic and Convex Combinations Projection Fourier-Motzkin Elimination Solving Linear Programs using Projection Deriving Theorems of the Alternatives using Projection Simplex Algorithm Column Generation Cutting stock problem Vehicle routing problem Cutting Planes Dantzig-Wolfe Decomposition Benders Decomposition Benders Decomposition Explained Capacitated Facility Location - MIP Model Capacitated Facility Location - MIP Model Solving using CPLEX Capacitated Facility Location - Auto Benders Capacitated Facility Location - Manual Benders

item.title: Reading
item.author: kunlei1987@gmail.com (Kunlei Lian)
item.description: I am an avid reader and below compiles the books I read or am reading… 2021 Raising Financially Fit Kids by Joline Godfrey The Most Important Thing: Uncommon Sense for the Thoughtful Investor by Howard S. Marks 早起的奇迹 人间值得 Frugal Isn’t Cheap by Clare Levison 2020 A liberated mind Thinking, fast and slow Nudge: Improving Decisions About Health, Wealth, and Happiness Winning the Loser’s Game Your money or your life Better than before Black box thinking Paradox of choice The 5 A.

item.title: Resume
item.author: kunlei1987@gmail.com (Kunlei Lian)
item.description: Summary Currently Sr. Data Scientist (Operations Research) working at Walmart Labs. Education Ph.D. in Industrial Engineering University of Arkansas, 2012 - 2017 Dissertation: service consistency in vehicle routing M.S. in Industrial Engineering Huazhong University of Science and Technology, 2009 - 2012 Thesis topic: manufacturing system optimization B.S. in Industrial Engineering Huazhong University of Science and Technology, 2005 - 2009 Thesis topic: process planning optimization Experience Sr.

item.title: C++
item.author: kunlei1987@gmail.com (Kunlei Lian)
item.description: This page lists all the C++-related posts. Data types Variable initialization Study Log

item.title: CPLEX
item.author: kunlei1987@gmail.com (Kunlei Lian)
item.description: This is an index page for all CPLEX-related posts. CPLEX Java API Setup API deep dive IloAddable and IloModel IloModel, IloModeler and IloMPModeler Model building By row without IloLPMatrix with IloLPMatirx By column without IloLPMatrix with IloLPMatrix Callback Optimization callback Continuous callback

item.title: Java
item.author: kunlei1987@gmail.com (Kunlei Lian)
item.description: This is an index page for all Java-related posts. poi lombok MultiKeyMap

item.title: About Me
item.author: kunlei1987@gmail.com (Kunlei Lian)
item.description: Hello! My name is Kunlei Lian, and I work as a Staff Data Scientist at Walmart Labs. Wait, Data Scientist? Yeah, I know. You probably couldn’t get any flavor of data science in my posts here, BECAUSE I AM NOT DOING ANY DATA SCIENCE WORK. Data scientist is a big umbrella in Walmart and I am actually an undercover Operations Research Scientist (don’t ask where I work:-)). I do all kinds of optimization works in supply chain area, routing is my favorite.
